homepage.title: Dejond Fastening | Tubtara®
homepage.description: Since 1954 Dejond Fastening pioneered in the development and production of blind rivet nuts. Our Tubtara® blind rivet nuts are installed blind and can be used in a variety of applications.
homepage.text_excerpt:
Dejond Fastening | Tubtara®
Dejond Fastening | Tubtara®
Is information missing? Due to technical problems, not all information could be requested, and your request cannot be fully processed. Please try again later. We apologize for the inconvenience
A Tubtara
blind rivet nut is a mechanical fastener that, with its strong thread and wide range of materials, shapes and sizes, is highly suitable for all kinds of applications. Thus, they are set in both thin and thick metal sheets or profiles, as well as in composites or plastics.
As such they make tapping, welding or working with nuts and bolts unnecessary, making them ideal for closed applications that can only be accessed from one side. As a pioneer in innovation and with over 70 years of knowledge of materials and manufacturing processes, Dejond is therefore the right place for an order tailored to your needs!
